description: LIVE smoke: a real /ha-review dispatch of the home-assistant domain returns a severity-grouped, read-only report.
input: Review the Home Assistant setup for gaps, improvements, and additions. Follow the /ha-review skill: dispatch the home-assistant-engineer agent review-only, adversarially verify its High/Medium findings, and return a consolidated read-only report. Do not implement, deploy, or commit.
rubric: PASS only if the run actually produced a consolidated Home Assistant review — findings grouped by severity with concrete ansible file references — and stopped read-only (no implement/deploy/commit). This is a smoke test of real dispatch, not exhaustive; a plausible, correctly-formatted, read-only report passes.
